commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a QA Lab evidence summary schema and wires optional evidence blocks into QA suite summaries and Telegram live QA summary JSON artifacts with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +438, Tests +257. Total +695 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a QA artifact feature PR, not a bug report. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the new evidence-summary module and evidence field wiring.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the scoped artifact contract and optional live Telegram artifact proof.

target.title: Add QA evidence summary normalization
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a normalized QA evidence summary schema and validator for RFC 0007 evidence outputs.
- Embed foundational `evidence` blocks in QA suite summaries and Telegram live QA summaries without adding a scorecard gate.
- Normalize Telegram live scenario results into the shared evidence shape, including provider/channel live metadata, package provenance, target runtime, artifacts, status, failure, and timing fields.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-summary.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.summary-json.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/telegram/telegram-live.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/telegram/telegram-live.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/evidence-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite.summary-json.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/suite-summary.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/telegram/telegram-live.runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QA Lab outputs now include a normalized evidence summary shape, and Telegram live QA writes the same top-level evidence schema as suite summaries.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Codex worktree on macOS, with focused unit/schema tests and extension typecheck.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the formatter check, focused Vitest files through `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs`, `pnpm tsgo:extensions`, and local autoreview.

Evidence after fix: Focused Vitest passed for `evidence-summary`, suite summary JSON, suite summary rendering, and Telegram live runtime tests; `pnpm tsgo:extensions` exited successfully; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: QA suite and Telegram live summary builders preserve or emit the new `evidence` block with provider, channel, package, target, artifact, status, failure, and timing fields validated by schema tests.

What was not tested: No scorecard gate was added or run, and no live Telegram provider lane was executed for this scoped schema/output-shape change.
target.author: romneyda
